description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian with a slim build, standing with arms outstretched to the sides. She wears a cropped short-sleeve top and high-waisted pants, exposing her midriff, and has a utility belt with a pouch slung around her waist. Her footwear consists of sturdy boots, and she wears gloves on both hands. The character's hair is long, voluminous, and styled in thick, uneven layers that frame her face and extend down her back. Her facial features are sharp and expressive, giving her a confident, urban appearance suitable for a city environment.
description: A stylized adult female pedestrian with long layered hair, cropped top, high-waisted pants, gloves, boots, and a utility belt with pouch.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, cropped top, gloves, utility belt, and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hair volume, and the pouch on the belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the layered hair, exposed midriff, and the back of the boots and belt.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm position, and the belt pouch.
attribute_clothing_type: cropped short-sleeve top, high-waisted pants, utility belt with pouch, gloves
